steps.title: Use the graph coordinates
steps.content: The $x$-axis represents temperature in kelvins, and the $y$-axis represents volume in liters. To answer the question, find the point on the graph where $x=500$.

steps.title: Read the matching volume
steps.content: At $x=500$, the graph has $y=7$. That means the estimated volume is $7$ liters. The answer is C.
